source: RCA-11 / AO-10b grade normalization readiness inventory
remainingEnvironmentGate: Confirm the AO-10b migration is applied in the target DB and run the live grade-format verifier against that target DB before broad rollout.

evidence: AO-10b grade backfill: presence + parse non-vacuity
AO-10b (Part A): extraction parity with TS normalizeGrade
AO-10b (Part B): write-path RPC defaults flipped to bare grade

artifacts.readinessRole: Queries live Supabase tables for P5 grade-format drift before launch; requires target DB credentials.
